nodes.name: Myioborus
nodes.summary: Myioborus（Myioborus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联12种鸟类，如Painted redstart、Slate-throated whitestart、Brown-capped whitestart等12种鸟类。

nodes.name: White-faced whitestart
nodes.summary: White-faced whitestart（Myioborus albifacies）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如White-faced whitestart。

nodes.name: White-faced whitestart
nodes.summary: The white-faced whitestart or white-faced redstart (Myioborus albifacies) is a species of bird in the family Parulidae. It is endemic to humid highland forests in the tepuis of south-western Venezuela. Due to its isolated range, it is very poorly known. References
